name: @automagik/genie-ui
description: genie-ui — the fleet floor: a browser-served, PTY-faithful terminal pane per fleet member (bare-ws PTY server + vanilla-TS xterm client). No Electron/Tauri, no Vite.
$comment: Runtime deps (node-pty, ws, @xterm/*) live in the ROOT package.json: the genie repo has NO workspaces field, so a package-local `dependencies` block would not be installed by the root `bun install`. Following the repo's single-node_modules precedent keeps one lockfile and one gate surface. See README.md.
